name: stockfish-analyzer
description: 国际象棋引擎分析工具，提供最佳走法推荐、局面评估和多种走法选择分析。支持FEN字符串直接输入分析。
capabilities: Get best move recommendations for any chess position
Generate multiple top move options with trade-off analysis
Evaluate position advantage using centipawn scores or mate predictions
Convert UCI move notation to SAN format for teaching purposes
Support Chinese and English instructions for analysis
Auto-detect FEN strings and user intent from chat
author: CK991357
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill with no executable code. SKILL.md provides instructional guidance for AI assistants acting as chess tutors. No filesystem access, network calls, or command execution capabilities. The static analysis flagged JSON syntax patterns and Chinese text as security threats - these are false positives. The skill only contains text-based guidance for chess position analysis.
valueStatement: Chess players need expert move recommendations and position analysis to improve their game. This skill connects AI assistants to Stockfish engine for instant best move suggestions, multi-option analysis, and professional-grade position evaluation.
limitations: Requires valid FEN string input for position analysis
Does not validate chess rules or move legality
Does not play complete games or maintain game state
Cannot analyze board screenshots or images

useCases.title: Learn from AI coaching
useCases.description: Receive step-by-step move explanations and strategic guidance to understand why certain moves are best

useCases.title: Deepen your tactics
useCases.description: Analyze complex positions and compare multiple candidate moves to understand strategic trade-offs

useCases.title: Create chess content
useCases.description: Generate professional analysis and explanations for educational materials or game reviews

promptTemplates.title: Basic position analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 1 最佳走法是什么？

promptTemplates.title: Compare multiple moves
promptTemplates.prompt: r1bqkbnr/pp1ppppp/2n5/2p5/4P3/5N2/PPPP1PPP/RNBQKB1R w KQkq - 2 3 帮我分析前三步好走法

promptTemplates.title: Position evaluation
promptTemplates.prompt: r1bqkbnr/pp1ppppp/2n5/2p5/4P3/5N2/PPPP1PPP/RNBQKB1R w KQkq - 2 3 现在谁有优势？局面评估如何？

promptTemplates.title: Strategic explanation
promptTemplates.prompt: r1bqkbnr/pp1ppppp/2n5/2p5/4P3/5N2/PPPP1PPP/RNBQKB1R w KQkq - 2 3 最佳走法是什么？请解释这步棋的战略意图

bestPractices: Always provide valid FEN strings to ensure accurate position analysis
Ask for move explanations to understand strategic reasoning behind recommendations
Request multiple options when exploring complex positions to compare trade-offs
antiPatterns: Asking for moves without providing the current board position (FEN required)
Blindly playing AI suggestions without understanding the strategic reasoning
Expecting the AI to play a complete game from start to finish

faq.question: Which AI platforms support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through their tool calling interface.

faq.question: What is a FEN string and where do I get one?
faq.answer: FEN is a standard notation describing a chess position. Chess apps, engines, and websites can export FEN strings.

faq.question: Does the AI store my game data?
faq.answer: No. This is a pure analysis skill. No game positions or personal data is stored or transmitted externally.

faq.question: Can it analyze positions in Chinese?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill supports both Chinese and English instructions for moves, evaluation, and explanations.

faq.question: What analysis depth can it provide?
faq.answer: The Stockfish engine provides move quality assessment, position scores in centipawns, and mate-in-N calculations.

faq.question: How is this different from a chess app?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on teaching and explaining moves. It transforms engine output into human-readable strategic guidance.
